title: The Structure of Self-Governance
subtitle: Spirit, Thought, Instrument — how the people build a more perfect union.

steps.title: The People's Branch
steps.description: To build a more perfect union.

steps.title: The Spirit
steps.description: Aspirations, life, truth, love — animating, revealing, illuminating, embracing. The principles manifested and expressed.

steps.title: The Thought
steps.description: The civic engine. Ideas gathered, focused, understood, declared, agreed upon. Refined and tried by the people.

steps.title: The Instrument
steps.description: The platform. Where individuals rise, groups form, volunteers build, and representatives hear. Town → state → federal. The fractal.

steps.title: The People
steps.description: Growing, rising, gathering, focusing, understanding, declaring, agreeing. From one voice to a nation's mandate.

steps.title: The Principle
steps.description: The Golden Rule. Do to others what you would have them do to you. The foundation of law, execution, and justice.

steps.title: Why Now?
steps.description:
Because for 250 years, consent without voice was silence. The mechanism was missing.

It isn't missing anymore.
